name: declarativemanagement
title: Declarative Management Command
description: Enable your server to support declarative management or trigger a declarative management synchronization operation on the device.

payload.content: This command allows the server to turn on the declarative management engine on the device (the first time it is used), or to trigger a declarative management synchronization operation.

payloadkeys.content: The base64-encoded declarative management JSON request using a `TokensResponse`.
